Home / Services / Exterior Painting

Exterior Painting

Protect and beautify your home's exterior with our professional painting services.

Indianapolis weather can be tough on homes. From freezing winters to humid summers, your exterior paint job needs to withstand it all. We provide exterior painting services that not only enhance your home's curb appeal but also protect it from the elements. We understand the unique challenges of painting homes in the Indianapolis area, considering factors like the clay soil, freeze-thaw cycles, and potential for severe weather.

Our team begins with a thorough assessment of your home's exterior, identifying any areas of damage or wear. We then meticulously prepare the surfaces, including power washing, scraping, and priming, to ensure proper adhesion and a long-lasting finish. We use only premium exterior paints that are designed to withstand the harsh Indiana climate and resist fading, cracking, and peeling.

Whether you have a historic home in Noblesville or a newer construction in Carmel, we have the expertise to handle any exterior painting project. We take pride in our attention to detail and our commitment to providing exceptional results that will protect and beautify your home for years to come.

Our Process

  1. 01 Thorough Exterior Assessment
  2. 02 Power Washing and Surface Preparation
  3. 03 Application of Primer and Premium Exterior Paint
  4. 04 Detailed Inspection and Clean-up

Benefits

  • Increased Curb Appeal
  • Protection from Weather Damage
  • Extended Lifespan of Siding
  • Increased Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I repaint my home's exterior?

Typically, every 5-10 years, depending on the condition of the existing paint and the type of siding.

Do you offer color consultations for exterior painting?

Yes, we can help you choose the perfect colors to complement your home's style and surroundings.

Are you insured?

Yes, we are fully insured for your protection and peace of mind.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with exterior painting? Contact us today.
